Driven and enthusiastic software engineering aspirant with a solid grasp of computer science fundamentals. Fueled by a passion for creativity and a knack 
for finding innovative solutions, I thrive in collaborative team settings. Eager to contribute my skills to meaningful projects while further exploring my 
interests in AI, ML, Cloud computing, and design within the dynamic domain of software engineering.

PROJECTS 
 
Task Manager Website 
 Created a website for managing tasks, including to-do lists, reminders, and notes, along with sections   for a calendar, 
notifications, pending tasks, and updates.
 Employed HTML, CSS, and JavaScript to build the website, and utilized Figma, Adobe Illustrator, and    Photoshop for designing 
the user interface.

and JavaScript to build the website, and utilized Figma, Adobe Illustrator, and    Photoshop for designing

Amity University Noida, Inhouse Project 
 Developed a basic object detection project in Python using the YOLO pre-trained machine learning   model. This program can 
identify objects in images, such as cars, people, or animals, by drawing boxes around them. No additional libraries or complex 
tools were required, keeping the project simple and accessible. 

     Hyphen Ideathon Hackathon, Google Developer Student Clubs MPSTME Mumbai 
 Crafted "SoulSage," a mental health support platform accessible via all gadgets, prioritizing inclusivity, privacy, and 
personalized care.  
 The tools and resources I opted for were Python, Node.js and PHP for backend, HTML, CSS, JavaScript and React JS for 
frontend and framework. For database I opted for MongoDB. The cloud management tool I selected was AWS. Other 
resources I decided on were Google analytics for monitoring and analysis, WebRTC and WebSocket for video conferencing 
and instant communication.
